evals.expected_output: Runs 'ct task prune' with default 30-day threshold. Reports how many tasks were archived and any empty lists removed. If nothing qualifies, says 'Nothing to prune.'
expectations: Runs ct task prune with no extra flags (30-day default)
Reports results or says 'Nothing to prune' if output is empty

evals.expected_output: Runs 'ct task prune --dry-run --days 7' to preview what would be pruned with a 7-day threshold. Shows the preview without actually archiving anything.
expectations: Passes --dry-run and --days 7 through to ct task prune
Does not actually archive tasks — only previews

evals.prompt: clean up old tasks from the arc project, anything done more than 2 weeks ago
evals.expected_output: Runs 'ct task prune --days 14' to archive tasks completed more than 14 days ago. Reports results.
expectations: Runs ct task prune with the --days flag
